note: NOT the official profiler schema. This captures the FULL APPLICATION STACK RSS (embed server + chat server @ 6144-ctx q8_0 KV + Go engine + SQLite) under real queries — the number llama-bench (model-only) does not measure. Companion to 2026-07-02-vm-llama3.2-3b-4vcpu8gb.json.

memory_mb.comment: Chat server pre-allocates full q8 KV at load, so ~3.9 GB resident even idle. RSS approx equals PSS -> little shared memory, figure is honest not double-counted. Exceeds 3.5 GB self-target by ~0.4-0.7 GB but runs within 8 GB hard cap (no swap, no OOM).

throughput.comment: 3 back-to-back runs, no decay -> throttle proxy passes

latency_seconds.comment: RAG path dominated by 700-token gen + per-claim re-embedding verification, not first-token.

offline_verification.method: ss -tunp state established, filtered for non-loopback/non-ssh, sampled during real generation
offline_verification.result: PASS - zero external network calls during generation

functional.rag_explanatory: PASS - cited answer, verifier receipts working (verified / flagged / weak-support-0.59)

ship_blocker_found.summary: App non-functional out-of-the-box on audit VM: chat server dies, 'not healthy after 90s'.
ship_blocker_found.bug_a_draft_default: app.go:38-39 DefaultConfig sets DraftModel to 1B GGUF; client.go:56-58 passes --model-draft; download_model.sh ships only the 3B, so the file is absent -> chat server crashes. Contradicts ADR-012 (speculative decoding rejected).
ship_blocker_found.bug_b_flag_ordering: main.go:41-43,52 - Go flag package stops at first positional, so 'ofin ask --no-draft' silently ignores the flag; only 'ofin --no-draft ask' works.
ship_blocker_found.fix_verified_on_vm: Set DefaultConfig DraftModel to "" (draft off by default). Rebuilt. Natural-form 'ofin ask "..."' (no flag) then works: exit 0, chat server healthy, cited answer in 7s cold.
ship_blocker_found.still_recommended: Also make a missing draft GGUF non-fatal in client.go, and/or fix flag parsing so post-subcommand flags are honored (defense in depth).
